caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed on the front sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark wooden desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. To his left is a white backdrop featuring yellow stars and the words "UNION HUSTLE" repeated vertically. Above him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black container with "BOSS TALK" branding sits on the desk to his right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he looks toward someone off-camera, appearing to be engaged in a conversation. The camera angle and lighting remain consistent, with only minor changes in his posture and mouth movement across the frames.
